old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-inym.1","title":"Spec: Define density-aware startup delay","description":"Add normative section to spec defining density-aware startup delay.

## Location
Add to spec/09-packets-timing.md (or spec/05-routing.md if better fit)

## Content to specify

### Constants
- LISTEN_PERIOD_MIN: 30 seconds
- LISTEN_PERIOD_MAX: 60 seconds  
- DELAY_PER_NODE: 5 seconds
- MAX_STARTUP_DELAY: 300 seconds

### Behavior
1. On boot, node enters listen-only mode for random(LISTEN_PERIOD_MIN, LISTEN_PERIOD_MAX)
2. During listen period, count unique node IDs heard (from announces, DIOs)
3. After listen period, calculate: initial_delay = min(MAX_STARTUP_DELAY, nodes_heard * DELAY_PER_NODE)
4. Wait random(0, initial_delay) before first TX
5. MUST apply to: first announce, first DIO, first DIS

### Normative language
- MUST listen before transmitting
- MUST scale delay by observed density
- MAY use shorter listen period if channel appears idle (no packets heard)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:52:49.085599Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T16:52:49.085599Z","labels":["spec","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-inym","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:52:49.222546Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value:
{"notes":"## Backwards Compatibility

**No flag day required.**

- Old nodes: Start with random 1-30 sec delay (current behavior)
- New nodes: Listen first, scale delay by density
- Mixed network: Works. Old nodes start faster, may cause brief collision burst, but new nodes absorb it gracefully.

**Requirements:**
- New behavior MUST NOT require coordination with old nodes
- Density detection uses passive listening only
- No new message types or fields required"}
